Class AbstractSortedOperator

java.lang.Object
org.key_project.logic.op.AbstractOperator
org.key_project.logic.op.AbstractSortedOperator
All Implemented Interfaces:
Named, Operator, SortedOperator, Sorted, SyntaxElement
Direct Known Subclasses:
Function, JAbstractSortedOperator, Modality
public abstract class AbstractSortedOperator extends AbstractOperator implements SortedOperator
Abstract sorted operator class offering some common functionality.

  • Method Details

    • sort

      public final Sort sort(Sort[] sorts)
      Description copied from interface: Operator
      Determines the sort of the Term if it would be created using this Operator as top level operator and sub terms of sorts sorts. The assumption that the constructed term would be allowed is not checked.
      Specified by:
      sort in interface Operator
      Parameters:
      sorts - an array of Sort containing the sort of the subterms of a (potential) term with this operator as top level operator
      Returns:
      sort of the term with this operator as top level operator of the given substerms

    • argSort

      public final Sort argSort(int i)
      Specified by:
      argSort in interface SortedOperator

      argSorts in interface SortedOperator

    • sort

      public final Sort sort()
      Description copied from interface: Sorted
      the sort of the entity
      Specified by:
      sort in interface Sorted
      Returns:
      the Sort of the sorted entity
